debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : OrderBot ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace ι
hX :
  Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassDL ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassD ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P

failed_attempts: simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup] using hX.classDL.locally_classD

classical
  simpa [HasLocallyIntegrableSup, Locally] using
    (IsStable.isStable_locally (isStable := isStable_classDL (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P) (E := E)) hX
      (fun X hX => (ClassDL.locally_classD (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P) (X := X) hX)))
simpa using hX.imp (fun _ h => ClassDL.locally_classD (X := X) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P) h)
simpa using hX.stable (isStable_classDL (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P)) (fun Y hY => hY.locally_classD)

intro t
  rcases hX t with ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_le, hτ_tendsto, hclassDL⟩
  refine ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_le, hτ_tendsto, fun n => ?_⟩
  exact (hclassDL n).classD
simpa using hX.map (fun _ h => h.classD)

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_tendsto, hXτ⟩
  refine ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_tendsto, fun n => ?_⟩
  exact (hXτ n).locally_classD
simpa using hX.locally_of_imp (fun _ h => ClassDL.classD h) h𝓕
simpa [Locally] using hX.map (fun _ h => h.classD)
simpa using hX.locally_mono (fun _ h => (h.classD_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕))
simpa [Locally] using fun n => (hX n).locally_classD

simpa using (hX.isStable (isStable_classDL (ι := ι) (Ω := Ω) (E := E) (mΩ := mΩ) (P := P)
    (𝓕 := 𝓕)) h𝓕).mono (fun _ h => h.classD)
simpa using hX.mono (fun _ hx => (hx.classD))
simpa [Locally] using fun t => (hX t).classD

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, hXτ⟩
  refine ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, fun n => (hXτ n).locally_classD⟩
simpa using hX.monotone (fun _ => ClassDL.classD)
simpa [ClassDL.locally_classD] using hX
simpa using hX.locally_mono (fun _ h => h.classD)
simpa using hX.locally_mono (fun _ => ClassDL.locally_classD (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P))

simpa [Locally] using fun t ht =>
    (hX t ht).classD
simpa using hX.locally_classD
simpa using hX.mono (fun _ h => ClassDL.classD h)
exact Locally.mono hX (fun _ => ClassDL.classD)
simpa using (hX.locally_mono (fun _ h => (h.classD_of_isRightContinuous h𝓕)))
simpa using hX.congr (fun Y hY => (ClassDL.locally_classD (𝓕 := 𝓕) (P := P) hY))

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, hXτ⟩
  refine ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, fun n => ?_⟩
  exact (hXτ n).classD

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, hXτ⟩
  refine ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, fun n => ?_⟩
  exact (hXτ n).classD

simpa [Locally] using
    hX.map (fun Y hY => (ClassDL.locally_classD (𝓕 := 𝓕) (X := Y) (P := P) hY))

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, hXτ⟩
  refine ⟨τ, hτ, hτ_lim, fun n => (hXτ n).locally_classD⟩
simpa [Locally] using fun n => (hX n).locally_classD
simpa using hX.monotone (fun _ => ClassDL.classD)

classical
  simpa [ClassDL.locally_classD] using hX
